title: Reincarnation
description: An epic take on Minecraft's artstyle.
body:
Ever since I started playing Minecraft, I felt like it needed a breeze of fresh air. I downloaded a handful of gorgeous resource packs but none pleased me. That's why I made "**Reincarnation**", I realized after giving it some thoughts that I just needed Minecraft, but more medieval, more fantasy looking.

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4152447b33af9fe83cad4299d1a7e9f7d73f890b.png)
**[Discord](https://discord.gg/KkAQsuVzp5) - [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/icedmi.bsky.social)**

So no, **Reincarnation** isn't just another "default but better", it has its own identity. Inspired by games like Skyrim or Elden Ring, I try to make the experience as epic and immersive as I can. *So get your helmet traveler, adventure awaits!*
